name: Fahmny DSA
description: AI-powered educational platform that helps students, instructors, and developers understand Data Structures and Algorithms through interactive visualizations generated directly from their source code.
features: Interactive AI-driven code visualization directly from source code
Support for complex Data Structures and Algorithms rendering
Real-time code editing using Monaco Editor integrated with Tanstack Query
Responsive node-based diagramming built with React Flow and Tailwind CSS
Multi-language support backed by Python and .Net processing services

name: Smart Clinic Appointment System
description: Microservices-based healthcare management platform supporting authentication, doctor scheduling, appointment booking, medical visits, billing, and automated patient reminders.
features: Microservices architecture integrating .NET and Spring Boot backend services
Role-based authentication and secure patient records management
Real-time doctor scheduling and automated appointment booking workflows
Comprehensive medical billing and clinical consultation tracking
Automated patient notifications and appointment reminder alerts

name: Elrooh Shopify Store
description: My first deployed Shopify e-commerce store tailored to business branding and customer experience requirements.
features: Custom Liquid theme design tailored to unique business branding
Optimized mobile-first shopping experience and seamless checkout flow
Dynamic product catalogs and intuitive inventory management
Fast page load times and conversion-focused UI/UX layouts

name: Medical Network Platform
description: Medical Network is an officially registered healthcare technology company developing a multi-tenant SaaS platform for healthcare providers across Egypt, including clinics, hospitals, laboratories, and pharmacies.
features: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture designed for medical facilities across Egypt
Unified portal for hospitals, clinics, laboratories, and pharmacies
High-performance backend API built with Golang (Fiber) and PostgreSQL
Admin dashboard and reporting suite built on Refine and Tanstack Query
HIPAA-inspired healthcare data privacy and enterprise role management

name: Converting PDF Templates to Dynamic HTML Pages
description: I worked on converting PDF templates (bill and ticket pages) into dynamic HTML pages using Handlebars.js to fetch data from JSON files. Both pages were designed to be fully responsive across devices and print-friendly for easy printing 🖨️. For the ticket page, I also added a feature to auto-generate QR codes, making it convenient for ticket validation 🎫📲
features: Dynamic HTML template rendering driven by JSON data using Handlebars.js
Print-friendly layouts specifically optimized for receipts, bills, and tickets
Automated QR code generation for instant ticket validation and scanning
Cross-device responsive design ensuring accuracy on mobile and desktop

name: ECU_AN
description: Cross-platform mobile attendance application supporting QR code and NFC-based attendance tracking with automatic Excel report generation.
features: Cross-platform mobile app built with Expo and React Native
Instant attendance check-in via QR code scanning and NFC contactless tracking
Automated generation and export of detailed attendance Excel reports
Modern native styling implemented with Nativewind CSS
